changes: Issue 1: Removed ellipsis (\u2026) from all RichText placeholders: 'First name', 'Last name', 'Role / Job Title'
Issue 2: Changed name wrapper from plain div to 'flex gap-2 flex-wrap' so there is always a visible gap between first and last name fields, regardless of content
Issue 3: Added className='inline-block min-w-[6rem]' to both first name and last name RichText fields so empty fields have a minimum clickable area
Removed the conditional '{ firstName && \' \' }' text-node spacer — replaced by flex gap-2
Issue 1: Removed ellipsis (\u2026) from all three TextControl/TextareaControl placeholders: 'Enter first name', 'Enter last name', 'Enter role or job title'

fixesApplied.description: Removed trailing ellipsis from all 6 placeholder strings across both files

Name wrapper div changed from plain div to flex container with gap-2 and flex-wrap. The gap-2 provides a constant visible separation between first and last name fields. flex-wrap allows wrapping on narrow widths. The conditional text-node spacer '{ firstName && \' \' }' was removed as it is no longer needed.

Both name RichText fields given className='inline-block min-w-[6rem]' ensuring a minimum width of ~96px. An empty RichText rendered as a span has no intrinsic dimensions — inline-block + min-w forces the element to occupy space even with no content, making it clickable before any text is typed.

buildStatus.note: Lint now fully clean — zero errors, only pre-existing warnings in unrelated blocks.
